mapper.sql: id, post_id, stat_date, uv_count, pv_count, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_post_view_daily (post_id, stat_date, uv_count, pv_count, created_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{statDate}, #{uvCount}, #{pvCount}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_post_view_daily SET post_id = #{postId}, stat_date = #{statDate}, uv_count = #{uvCount}, pv_count = #{pvCount}, created_at = #{createdAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM forum_post_view_daily ORDER BY stat_date DESC, post_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_post_view_daily (post_id, stat_date, uv_count, pv_count, created_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{statDate}, #{uvCount}, #{pvCount}, #{createdAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE uv_count = uv_count + #{uvCount}, pv_count = pv_count + #{pvCount}, created_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
